releases.name: Auto Move On Property 1.0.1

releases.author: SoulBits-Vibe
releases.description:
Initial clean release of Auto Move On Property.

Install files:
- main.js
- manifest.json

This release moves notes based on matching YAML property/value rules, supports root and watched-folder monitoring, and supports both single-line frontmatter values and YAML list values.
releases.name: Auto Move On Property 1.0.0
